title: Tactical Insight
changes: Turn Counter: Track the progression of your saga with the new Turn Count indicator.
Battle Coordinates: Toggleable A-H and 1-8 labels for precise strategic command.
UX Stability: Resolved a UI reference error and font loading issues for smoother gameplay.

title: Ruthless Intent
changes: AI Re-balancing: Significantly increased AI aggression and board pressure.
Vulnerability Hunter: AI now actively prioritizes targets with the -2 DEF debuff.
Promotion Focus: AI is now more determined to promote pawns to Queens.
Calculated Risk: AI is more willing to take even-odds skirmishes instead of hiding.
Defensive Tweak: AI still protects its King but no longer retreats cowardly at the cost of the board.

title: The Siege Update
changes: Siege Overhaul: Interactive Onagers. Click to target single units for 12-16 DMG.
AI Intelligence Upgrades: Defensive evasion, Guardian perimeters, and Winner-First logic.
Opportunity Attacks: Moving units become Vulnerable (-2 DEF) for 1 turn.
Audio Engine: Dynamic BGM, local SFX, and random ambient sounds.
Bullseye Halo: New pulsing red indicators for vulnerable units.
UX Fixes: Click-through health bars and stable scenery.

title: Castarook Ascendant
changes: Rebranding: Project officially renamed to CASTAROOK.
Piece Dice: Scaled combat dice (Pawn D6 to King D20).
Greedy AI: Added Singleplayer mode with strategic logic.
Terrain: Introduced Stone Plaza and procedural landmarks.
Stat Caps: Capped Veteran Kills and Defenses at +5.

title: Initial Release
changes: Basic 3D Chess implementation with RPG Health and Combat.
Low-poly procedural environment.
Day/Night cycle.
Combat animations.
